definition: Paid-out cost including hired human labour; hired and owned bullock labour; owned and hired machine labour; hired machinery charges; seed; insecticides and pesticides; manure; fertilizers; irrigation charges; depreciation of implements and farm buildings; land revenue, cesses and other taxes; interest on working capital; and miscellaneous expenses.
Cost A1 plus rent paid for leased-in land.
Cost A1 plus interest on value of owned fixed capital assets, excluding land.
Cost B1 plus rental value of owned land, net of land revenue, and rent paid for leased-in land.
Cost B1 plus imputed value of family labour.
Cost B2 plus imputed value of family labour.
Cost C2 plus additional value of human labour based on a higher wage rate in consideration of the statutory minimum wage rate.
Cost C2* plus 10 percent of Cost C2* to account for managerial input of the farmer.
